taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: 3+ years of hands-on software development in enterprise environments, Strong technical background in Java, Python, Go, and JavaScript (including ReactJS and Redux), Proven experience building and deploying microservices-based applications within containerized environments, Solid understanding of software design patterns, TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and RESTful APIs, Experience with database management (SQL and NoSQL)
preferred_quals: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a relevant technical field, Experience deploying and managing applications on platforms such as AWS, GCP, VMWare, OpenStack, or OpenShift, Proficiency with infrastructure-as-code and automation tools, including Terraform, Ansible, GitOps, Jenkins, and Argo CD, Experience with monitoring and logging tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Fluent Bit) and a strong grasp of secure software development practices, Demonstrated ability to mentor junior engineers, conduct thorough code reviews, lead postmortem analysis, and share technical knowledge through documentation, blogs, or internal presentations
core_responsibilities: Design and develop scalable, microservices-based applications using Java, Python, Go, and JavaScript, ensuring high-quality code through rigorous TDD practices and modern software design patterns, Architect and implement robust CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code (IaC) solutions using Terraform, Ansible, and GitOps to streamline continuous delivery and deployment, Deploy, manage, and optimize enterprise applications across multi-cloud and hybrid environments, including AWS, GCP, VMWare, and OpenShift, to ensure high availability and performance, Monitor production environments using tools like Prometheus, Grafana, and the ELK stack, serving as an escalation point for on-call issues and driving proactive incident resolution, Lead postmortem reviews and conduct comprehensive root cause analysis (RCA) to identify system bottlenecks, improve reliability, and prevent future production incidents, Develop and maintain secure, high-performance RESTful and GraphQL APIs, incorporating OAuth 2.0 and OpenAPI 3.0 standards to ensure robust integration across systems, Mentor junior engineers, conduct thorough code reviews, and provide technical guidance to foster a culture of engineering excellence and continuous learning within the team, Collaborate with cross-functional partners to estimate project timelines, track milestones, and provide ongoing updates, while sharing technical knowledge through documentation, internal presentations, and blogs
job_summary: Cisco is revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era. They are seeking a Software Engineer to join their Infrastructure and Cloud Services team, focusing on building and improving tools and integrations that support Cisco’s cloud services.
